messages.content:
Downloading and analyzing the lab report PDF from:
`https://ncameodemostorage.blob.core.windows.net/ncameo/wiaipqkyiohiiaxfiles/-8584216306676568757Lab%20results%20M_Redacted.pdf`

Analyzing biomarkers against BloomCell functional ranges and generating structured insights…





Now updating the Cosmos DB document with the full payload + `highlightData`:



✅ Document `378cbb80-db30-4257-a4c3-04573f85afc7` updated successfully in Cosmos DB with `highlightData` containing 8 BloomCell analysis objects.
